name: @metorial/sitespeakai
description: Query custom-trained AI chatbots and manage their configurations, conversations, and training data. Send questions to chatbots and receive AI-generated answers with source citations. Retrieve and manage conversation history, captured leads, suggested messages, and training sources. Create, retrieve, and delete fine-tuned question-answer pairs to override or improve chatbot responses. Access chatbot settings including appearance, behavior, AI model configuration, and escalation rules. List all chatbots and retrieve account details.
